query: SELECT p.name as pipeline_name, p.pipelineType, ps.name as stage_name, ps.orderIndex FROM pipelines p JOIN pipeline_stages ps ON ps.pipelineId = p.id WHERE p.tenantId = 120003 ORDER BY p.id, ps.orderIndex;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute SELECT p.name as pipeline_name, p.pipelineType, ps.name as stage_name, ps.orderIndex FROM pipelines p JOIN pipeline_stages ps ON ps.pipelineId = p.id WHERE p.tenantId = 120003 ORDER BY p.id, ps.orderIndex;
